---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug you found in GradeFlow
title: "[BUG] Brief description of the issue"
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

Brief summary of the bug. What were you trying to do when it happened?

## Steps to Reproduce

How can we reproduce this bug? List detailed steps:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Enter '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened instead?

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened? Include:

- Error messages (copy exact text)
- Screenshots or videos
- Unexpected results

## Environment

Please provide:

- **Browser**: Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge? (with version)
- **Device**: Desktop, iPad, iPhone, Android?
- **OS**: Windows 10, macOS 12, iOS 15, Android 13?
- **GradeFlow Version**: (visible in app footer, if available)
- **Internet**: Online, offline, or intermittent?

## Reproducibility

- [ ] Always happens
- [ ] Happens sometimes (how often?)
- [ ] Rare, hard to reproduce

## Data Loss

- [ ] No data lost
- [ ] Data was lost - how can we help recover?

## Workaround

Did you find a workaround? If so, describe:

## Additional Context

Any other info that might help us fix this?

---

**Before submitting**:

- [ ] I tried refreshing the page (F5 or Ctrl+F5)
- [ ] I tried a different browser
- [ ] I checked [FAQ.md](../docs/FAQ.md) for similar issues
- [ ] I'm not reporting security issue (use [oshinayadamilola3@gmail.com](mailto:oshinayadamilola3@gmail.com) instead)
